enumeration_literals.name: Db256US
enumeration_literals.description: 1024 us debounce time. Recommended for NX1612AA and NX1210AB crystals.

simple_types.code:
type TRACECONFIG_TRACEMUX_Field is
   Gpio,
   Serial,
   Parallel)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: Gpio
enumeration_literals.description:
SWO trace signal routed to pin. Remaining pins can be used as regular
GPIOs.

enumeration_literals.name: Serial
enumeration_literals.description: All trace signals (TRACECLK and TRACEDATA[n]) routed to pins.

type TRACECONFIG_TRACEPORTSPEED_Field is
   Val_32Mhz,
   Val_16Mhz,
   Val_8Mhz,
   Val_4Mhz)
  with Size => 2;

record_types.name: CLOCK_Peripheral

fields.name: EVENTS_CTTO
fields.description: Calibration timer has been started and is ready to process new tasks

fields.name: EVENTS_CTSTARTED
fields.description: Calibration timer has been stopped and is ready to process new tasks

fields.name: INTENCLR
fields.description: Status indicating that HFCLKSTART task has been triggered

fields.name: HFCLKSTAT
fields.description: Status indicating that LFCLKSTART task has been triggered

fields.name: LFCLKSTAT
fields.description: Copy of LFCLKSRC register, set when LFCLKSTART task was triggered

fields.name: LFCLKSRC
fields.description:
HFXO debounce time. The HFXO is started by triggering the
TASKS_HFCLKSTART task.

fields.name: CTIV
fields.description: Clocking options for the trace port debug interface

record_types.name: CTIV_Register
EVENTS_CTSTARTED_Register
EVENTS_CTSTOPPED_Register
EVENTS_CTTO_Register
EVENTS_DONE_Register
EVENTS_HFCLKSTARTED_Register
EVENTS_LFCLKSTARTED_Register
HFCLKRUN_Register
HFCLKSTAT_Register
HFXODEBOUNCE_Register
INTENCLR_Register

fields.name: HFCLKSTARTED
fields.description: Write '1' to disable interrupt for LFCLKSTARTED event

fields.name: Reserved_2_2
fields.description: Write '1' to disable interrupt for DONE event

fields.name: DONE
fields.description: Write '1' to disable interrupt for CTTO event

fields.name: Reserved_5_9
fields.description: Write '1' to disable interrupt for CTSTARTED event

fields.name: CTSTARTED
fields.description: Write '1' to disable interrupt for CTSTOPPED event

record_types.name: INTENSET_Register

fields.name: HFCLKSTARTED
fields.description: Write '1' to enable interrupt for LFCLKSTARTED event

fields.name: Reserved_2_2
fields.description: Write '1' to enable interrupt for DONE event

fields.name: DONE
fields.description: Write '1' to enable interrupt for CTTO event

fields.name: Reserved_5_9
fields.description: Write '1' to enable interrupt for CTSTARTED event

fields.name: CTSTARTED
fields.description: Write '1' to enable interrupt for CTSTOPPED event

record_types.name: LFCLKRUN_Register
LFCLKSRC_Register

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description:
Enable or disable bypass of LFCLK crystal oscillator with external
clock source

fields.name: BYPASS
fields.description: Enable or disable external source for LFCLK

record_types.name: LFCLKSRCCOPY_Register
LFCLKSTAT_Register
LFRCMODE_Register

fields.name: Reserved_1_15
fields.description: Active LFRC mode. This field is read only.

record_types.name: TASKS_CAL_Register
TASKS_CTSTART_Register
TASKS_CTSTOP_Register
TASKS_HFCLKSTART_Register
TASKS_HFCLKSTOP_Register
TASKS_LFCLKSTART_Register
TASKS_LFCLKSTOP_Register
TRACECONFIG_Register

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description:
Pin multiplexing of trace signals. See pin assignment chapter for
more details.

variables.name: CLOCK_Periph
variables.code:
CLOCK_Periph : aliased CLOCK_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => CLOCK_Base;
